name.es: Pan de masa madre con polenta y romero
name.fr: Pain au levain à la polenta et au romarin

description.en: Coarse polenta, plumped in hot whey, folds through a high-extraction wheat dough for a subtly sweet, corn-flecked crumb, with fresh rosemary running through for a savory lift. A distinctly American answer to the classic herbed hearth loaf.
description.de: Grobe Polenta, in heißer Molke aufgequollen, wird in einen hochausgemahlenen Weizenteig eingearbeitet – für eine dezent süße, mit Mais gesprenkelte Krume, dazu frischer Rosmarin für pikante Würze. Eine unverkennbar amerikanische Antwort auf das klassische Kräuterbrot.
description.es: Polenta gruesa, hinchada en suero de leche caliente, se incorpora a una masa de trigo de alta extracción para una miga sutilmente dulce y salpicada de maíz, con romero fresco que aporta un toque sabroso. Una respuesta claramente americana al clásico pan de hierbas.
description.fr: De la polenta grossière, gonflée dans du petit-lait chaud, s'incorpore à une pâte de blé à haute extraction pour une mie subtilement sucrée et mouchetée de maïs, avec du romarin frais qui apporte une note relevée. Une réponse résolument américaine au pain aux herbes classique.

origin.note: A contemporary artisan formula pairing American cornmeal traditions with a wheat sourdough base.

ingredients.note: blend of bread flour and a high-protein bread flour
coarse polenta, soaked in hot whey then drained
used to soak the polenta; most drains away before mixing

method.title: Build the levain
method.summary: Mix starter with bread flour, high-extraction flour and water; ripen at warm room temperature.

method.title: Soak the polenta
method.summary: Boil whey, stir in raw polenta and soak 45 minutes, then drain well through a sieve and cool completely.

method.title: Autolyse
method.summary: Combine the flours and most of the water; rest about 1.5 hours.

method.title: Mix
method.summary: Slap-and-fold in the levain, then work in salt, minced rosemary and the cooled, drained polenta.

method.title: Bulk ferment
method.summary: Ferment quickly (polenta speeds things up) over about 3.5 hours with four stretch-and-fold sets.

method.title: Shape
method.summary: Divide, preshape, rest 20 minutes, then shape into a batard or boule.

method.title: Bake
method.summary: Bake in a preheated Dutch oven at 230°C: 20 minutes covered with steam, then 25-30 minutes uncovered until golden.

method.title: Cool
method.summary: Rest at least 2 hours before slicing.

source.author: Maurizio Leo
source.adaptation: Polenta and whey treated as inclusions outside the 100% flour base; high-extraction flour modeled as a 60/40 white/whole-wheat blend for the formula's type breakdown.
